productStatement: GrantLayer turns agentic grant workflows into verifiable institutional records.

runtimeModes.secretExpectation: developer convenience; deterministic or placeholder secrets acceptable
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: local-only demo signing key reference, no external secret manager, no credential rotation
runtimeModes.secretSourceExpectation: may be a local file path or inline placeholder; must be clearly labeled as non-production
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready

runtimeModes.secretExpectation: deterministic automated verification; synthetic secrets acceptable
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: test-only fixture identifiers, mock secret sources, no real credentials
runtimeModes.secretSourceExpectation: in-memory or temporary; must be isolated from production data
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready

runtimeModes.secretExpectation: illustrative non-production walkthrough; placeholder secrets acceptable
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: demo fixture identifiers, local-only references, no real credential values
runtimeModes.secretSourceExpectation: local-only and labeled as synthetic; must not resemble real secrets
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready; explicitly labeled as demonstration only

runtimeModes.secretExpectation: controlled external technical integration; partner-agreed secret handling
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: partner-agreed secret source with documented constraints
runtimeModes.secretSourceExpectation: partner-agreed secret manager or environment boundary
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready without explicit partner agreement and documented constraints

runtimeModes.secretExpectation: production-like validation; same secret target as production
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: same secret source and rotation target as production; realistic but synthetic data
runtimeModes.secretSourceExpectation: production-like secret manager or validated environment boundary
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready; explicitly labeled as pre-production validation

runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: none — every required secret must come from an explicit validated source and the system must fail-closed if missing
runtimeModes.secretSourceExpectation: explicit secret manager, validated environment boundary, or approved secret provider
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: may be described as production-ready only when all required secret sources are explicit validated and monitored

secretCategories.purpose: Authenticate and authorize human operators and admins
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: deterministic placeholder references or mock provider
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit auth provider with validated operator identity
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in logs exports audit records or evidence bundles; source name may be logged but value must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation and revocation; stale tokens must be rejected
secretCategories.notes: Demo tokens are acceptable only in local-dev and demo modes. Production requires real auth provider configuration.

secretCategories.purpose: Authenticate internal and external services to each other
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: mock service identity or synthetic fixture reference
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit service identity provider with mTLS or equivalent
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in logs exports audit records or evidence bundles; source name may be logged but value must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation and revocation; stale credentials must be rejected
secretCategories.notes: Service-to-service credentials must be scoped to specific workflow boundaries.

secretCategories.purpose: Client secrets shared secrets or validation keys for the active auth provider
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: mock provider configuration with no real values
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit auth provider with validated client secrets and signing keys
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in any log export or error message; compromise allows identity forgery
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation on provider change or suspected compromise
secretCategories.notes: Auth provider secrets are the most sensitive category. They must never be exposed in diagnostics.

secretCategories.purpose: Connection authentication for the active persistence backend
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: local SQLite with no external credentials or mock connection string reference
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit secret boundary with validated database credentials
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: connection strings must be masked in logs and error messages; credentials must not appear in diagnostics
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation; stale credentials must be rejected immediately
secretCategories.notes: Database credentials must be sourced through the secret boundary and never logged in plaintext.

secretCategories.purpose: Ed25519 or future signing keys for grants evidence and provenance
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: local file path reference or demo key label with no real key value
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit managed secret boundary with rotation and access control
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in any log export audit record or evidence bundle; key identifier may be logged but value must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support scheduled rotation and emergency revocation; old signatures must remain verifiable
secretCategories.notes: Software signing is acceptable for pilots. HSM is a future upgrade path. No synthetic keypairs in production.

secretCategories.purpose: Access keys or tokens for external evidence storage backends
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: local file path reference or disabled external storage
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit secret boundary with validated storage credentials
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in evidence bundle metadata logs or exports; storage path may be logged but credentials must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation on storage provider change or suspected compromise
secretCategories.notes: Evidence storage credentials must not leak into evidence bundle metadata or provenance records.

secretCategories.purpose: API keys tokens or certificates for partner and third-party services
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: disabled integrations or mock provider references with no real values
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit scoped credentials sourced through secret boundary
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in logs exports or error messages; integration name may be logged but credentials must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation on partner change or suspected compromise
secretCategories.notes: External integration credentials must be scoped to the specific integration boundary only.

secretCategories.purpose: Shared secrets to verify incoming webhook payloads
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: disabled webhooks or mock shared secret reference with no real value
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit shared secret sourced through secret boundary with rotation support
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in logs exports or webhook handler output; webhook source may be logged but secret must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation; stale secrets must be rejected
secretCategories.notes: Webhook secrets must not be hard-coded in handler code or exposed in error responses.

secretCategories.purpose: Keys for encrypting sensitive fields at rest or in transit
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: mock encryption key reference with no real value or disabled encryption
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit managed encryption key with rotation and access control
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in any log export or diagnostic output; key identifier may be logged but value must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support scheduled rotation and re-encryption of affected data
secretCategories.notes: Encryption keys must be managed with the same rigor as signing keys.

secretCategories.purpose: Keys used to sign session tokens state tokens or transient auth artifacts
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: mock signing secret reference with no real value or disabled sessions
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit signing secret sourced through secret boundary different from auth provider credentials
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in logs exports or session metadata; secret identifier may be logged but value must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation; existing sessions must remain valid during grace period
secretCategories.notes: Session signing secrets must be rotated independently from auth provider credentials.

secretCategories.purpose: Credentials issued to integrators and external clients
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: mock client identifier with no real credential value
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit scoped and revocable client credentials sourced through secret boundary
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in logs exports openapi examples or client documentation; client name may be logged but credential must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support per-client rotation and revocation; compromised credentials must be invalidated immediately
secretCategories.notes: API client credentials must not appear in OpenAPI examples or integrator quickstart docs.

secretCategories.purpose: Access keys or tokens for backup and restore storage
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: disabled backups or mock storage reference with no real value
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit scoped backup credentials sourced through secret boundary
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in backup metadata logs or restore output; backup destination may be logged but credentials must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation; restore procedures must tolerate credential updates
secretCategories.notes: Backup credentials must be scoped to backup operations only and not reused for other storage.

secretCategories.purpose: Tokens or API keys for metrics logging or alerting backends
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: disabled observability or mock sink reference with no real value
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: explicit observability credentials sourced through secret boundary
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in startup logs health checks or diagnostics; sink name may be logged but credential must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation without interrupting observability data flow
secretCategories.notes: Observability credentials must not appear in startup output or health check responses.

secretCategories.purpose: Optional signing keys for blockchain anchoring or wallet operations
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: disabled blockchain integration or mock key reference with no real value
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: if enabled explicit managed key with off-chain storage and access control
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: must not appear in evidence bundle metadata logs or on-chain data; key identifier may be logged but value must not
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: must support rotation if enabled; on-chain key references must tolerate updates
secretCategories.notes: Blockchain and wallet keys are optional future integrations. Product Core must not depend on them.

secretCategories.purpose: Non-secret labels and fixture identifiers used in local test and demo environments
secretCategories.allowedSourceLocalTestDemo: synthetic fixture identifiers and deterministic placeholder labels
secretCategories.requiredSourceProduction: must not be present in production; must be clearly labeled as placeholders
secretCategories.loggingExportRules: placeholder identifiers are safe to log in test and demo modes; must not appear in production logs or exports
secretCategories.rotationExpectation: none — these are not real credentials and carry no rotation requirement
secretCategories.notes: Placeholder identifiers like demo-admin or test-operator are acceptable only outside production.

productionClaimRules: Production claim is allowed only when runtime mode is explicitly set to production.
Production claim requires all required secrets to be sourced from an explicit validated secret boundary.
Production claim requires no hard-coded default secrets in source code config or fixtures.
Production claim requires no demo or default admin tokens.
Production claim requires no placeholder secrets or synthetic keypairs.
Production claim requires secrets to be absent from logs exports examples fixtures and evidence bundles.
Production claim requires explicit database credential source.
Production claim requires explicit auth provider credential source.
Production claim requires explicit signing and key management source.
Production claim requires explicit evidence storage credential source where external storage is used.
Production claim requires rotation and revocation expectations to be documented and enforced.
Production claim requires fail-closed startup behavior if required secrets are missing or invalid.
